title: cynanchum tetrapterum
intro: Cynanchum tetrapterum, also known as the four-winged swallowwort, is a plant species within the Apocynaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cynanchum tetrapterum include reducing fever, alleviating pain and swelling, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Cynanchum tetrapterum typically involve drying the leaves and stems, and then making teas, infusions, or extracts from them, which can be used to treat various ailments.
